benefits.description: Ulnar wrist issue healed within 5 days with supportive care (brace, ice, mindful positioning)
2-year shoulder tendonopathy healed within 1 week despite months of physical therapy previously
At 500mcg per day, mood improved; at 1mg per day, caused anhedonia

side_effects.description: At 1mg daily dosing, caused anhedonia; repeated use at higher doses led to anxious anhedonia

protocol_notes: Initially dosed at 500mcg twice daily. Switched to 250mcg twice daily after initial healing. Injected subcutaneously above pain site on wrist. User notes source quality varies significantly; current source (2023) much more effective than source from summer previous year. Mentions compound is systemic despite localized injection.
